title: Carrier Global: Another Buying Opportunity Has Presented Itself
text: The Viessmann acquisition and reorganization plans provide strategic value and potential for growth, which may drive a re-rating of the stock. The Viessmann acquisition strengthens CARR's position in the European residential HVAC market, with synergies and growth prospects. CARR's reorganization plans, including the divestment of Commercial Refrigeration and potential sell-off of the Fire & Security segment, should further optimize the business cost structure.

title: Carrier Global (CARR) Up 1.6% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Carrier Global (CARR) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Carrier (CARR) Boosts Refrigeration Segment With New Products
text: Carrier's (CARR) Transicold expands offerings with Vector eCool, Syberia eCool, Eco-Drive 30T, Xarios 6 and Vector HE 17.

title: Carrier (CARR) Strengthens HVAC Offerings With i-Vu Pro Launch
text: Carrier (CARR) unveils i-Vu Pro v8.5 Software, enhancing building automation with advanced security and streamlined updates.

title: Carrier (CARR) Boosts BluEdge With TRU Battery Protection
text: Carrier's (CARR) Transicold expands refrigeration offerings with innovative battery protection solution.

title: Carrier Global Corporation (CARR) Presents at 2023 Goldman Sachs Industrials and Materials Conference (Transcript)
text: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE:CARR ) 2023 Goldman Sachs Industrials and Materials Conference Call May 10, 2023 12:30 PM ET Company Participants David Gitlin - Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Sam Pearlstein - VP of Investor Relations Conference Call Participants Joe Ritchie - Goldman Sachs Joe Ritchie Excited to have our post-lunch conversation with Carrier, obviously a lot of news with Carrier recently. We are excited to have the Chairman and CEO, Dave Gitlin as well as VP of Investor Relations, Sam Pearlstein here with us today.

title: Carrier Global Corporation (CARR) Oppenheimer's AT Annual Industrial Growth Conference Call Transcript
text: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE:CARR ) Oppenheimer's AT Annual Industrial Growth Conference Call May 9, 2023 3:45 PM ET Company Participants Patrick Goris - SVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Operator Well, good afternoon, everyone. Thanks so much for joining us at day two of Oppenheimer's AT Annual Industrial Growth Conference.

title: Carrier (CARR) Boosts Fire & Security Unit With Latest Move
text: Carrier's CARR Supra has integrated scheduling and lockbox access to its showing management tool, which is backed by BrokerBay. The new functionality allows real estate agents to access Supra iBox lockboxes directly from the scheduling mobile app, providing a seamless property access experience.

title: Revised Guidance Lifted Air Canada Stock but the Carrier Still Appears Undervalued
text: Any assessment of an airline stock, like Air Canada ( CA:AC ), must begin with two external factors: demand and fuel costs.

title: The Retirees' Dividend Portfolio: John And Jane's April 2023 Taxable Account Update
text: The Taxable Account generated $1,760.46 of dividend income for April 2023 compared with $1,609.40 of dividend income for April 2022. The Taxable Account had a balance of $523.4K as of April 30, 2023, vs. $522.7K on April 30, 2022. The annualized cost basis yield is 5.38%.

title: Performance Food Group Pilots Electric Refrigerated Truck with Navistar, Great Dane and Carrier Transicold
text: ANAHEIM, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Performance Food Group Company (PFG) (NYSE: PFGC), Navistar, Great Dane and Carrier Transicold, part of Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), have collaborated to launch a commercial evaluation program using all-electric refrigeration technology on a battery-electric truck for sustainable, direct-emissions-free distribution of refrigerated and frozen food. The technology will be featured at the Advanced Clean Transportation (ACT) Expo the week of May 1. PFG'.

title: 'We love competition': Qatar Airways CEO welcomes new Saudi carrier
text: "We will compete like we have been competing all these years," Qatar's CEO Akbar Al Baker said at the Arabian Travel Market conference in Dubai.

title: Carrier to Present at the Oppenheimer 18th Annual Industrial Growth Conference
text: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. , May 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR) Senior Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Patrick Goris will speak at the Oppenheimer 18th Annual Industrial Growth Conference on Tuesday, May 9, 2023 at 3:45 p.m.

title: Is Carrier Corporation Making a Huge Mistake?
text: On Monday, media reported that Carrier Corporation could potentially purchase Viessmann Climate Solutions. On Tuesday the news was confirmed: Carrier will pay $13.2 billion for Viessmann.
